# JointLimitation3D

**Inherits:** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

**Inherited By:** [JointLimitationCone3D](class_jointlimitationcone3d.md#class-jointlimitationcone3d)

A base class of the limitation that interacts with [ChainIK3D](class_chainik3d.md#class-chainik3d).

## Description

The limitation is attached to each joint and limits the rotation of the bone.
